title: TrustLens finding status
description: The five-state analysis status taxonomy. These five states are NOT interchangeable and MUST NOT be collapsed. In particular NOT_FOUND_WITHIN_ANALYSED_SCOPE and PARTIAL make different claims and are structurally distinguished by the `scope.failed` constraint in finding.schema.json.

FOUND.means: Evidence matching a supported rule, or an observed behavior, exists.
FOUND.does_not_mean: That the capability is reachable at runtime, that it is malicious, or that it is exploitable.
FOUND.requires: At least one evidence location, where a location is obtainable.

NOT_FOUND_WITHIN_ANALYSED_SCOPE.means: No matching path was found among the files, languages, rules, configurations and execution paths actually analysed, AND analysis of that scope completed successfully over every item.
NOT_FOUND_WITHIN_ANALYSED_SCOPE.does_not_mean: That the capability is absent from the artifact. It is a statement about the analysed scope, not about the world.
NOT_FOUND_WITHIN_ANALYSED_SCOPE.requires: scope.failed MUST be empty. A single parse failure invalidates this status for that check.

PARTIAL.means: Analysis of the intended scope started but did not complete over all of it.
PARTIAL.does_not_mean: Anything about whether the capability is present. It is strictly weaker than NOT_FOUND_WITHIN_ANALYSED_SCOPE and MUST NEVER be merged into it.
PARTIAL.requires: scope.analysed MUST be present, scope.failed MUST be non-empty, and every entry in scope.failed MUST carry a reason.

UNSUPPORTED.means: The component cannot assess the relevant construct at all — no rule, no parser, no observation channel exists for it.
UNSUPPORTED.does_not_mean: That the construct is absent or that it was examined and cleared.

UNKNOWN.means: Analysis was not attempted, was ambiguous, or required information was unavailable.

x-trustlens-absence-rule: Only NOT_FOUND_WITHIN_ANALYSED_SCOPE may be read as scoped absence, and even then only within the recorded scope. No status in this enum ever establishes that a capability is absent from the artifact.
